【VIVIENNE Clutch】m12269 Monogram/Blue (Christmas)
The Vivienne Clutch is part of the Snow Show collection, featuring a signature Monogram canvas and eye-catching wool trim to create a collectible choice. Microfiber lining prevents phone scratches, making it a perfect gift for the holiday season.
Size: 17.5 x 4.5 x 10 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12172 Blue] As one of Louis Vuitton's classic designs, the Sarah wallet blends Monogram canvas with grained leather lining, recreating the elegance of the envelope style. It features a spacious interior with 2 large compartments, 1 central zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots. Safely stores daily essentials. 19 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
items.name_cn: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12172 Blue] As one of Louis Vuitton's classic designs, the Sarah wallet blends Monogram canvas with grained leather lining, recreating the elegance of the envelope style. It features a spacious interior with 2 large compartments, 1 central zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots. Safely stores daily essentials. 19 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)

specs.rawTitle: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12172 Blue] As one of Louis Vuitton's classic designs, the Sarah wallet blends Monogram canvas with grained leather lining, recreating the elegance of the envelope style. It features a spacious interior with 2 large compartments, 1 central zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots. Safely stores daily essentials. 19 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12188 Blue] This Cléa wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte soft grained leather, highlighting the eye-catching Monogram embossing with a dual-tone effect. The compact design includes a bill compartment, zip coin pocket, and card slots. 11 x 8.5 x 3.5 cm (L x H x W)
items.name_cn: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12188 Blue] This Cléa wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte soft grained leather, highlighting the eye-catching Monogram embossing with a dual-tone effect. The compact design includes a bill compartment, zip coin pocket, and card slots. 11 x 8.5 x 3.5 cm (L x H x W)

specs.rawTitle: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12188 Blue] This Cléa wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte soft grained leather, highlighting the eye-catching Monogram embossing with a dual-tone effect. The compact design includes a bill compartment, zip coin pocket, and card slots. 11 x 8.5 x 3.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12536 Blue] This Lisa wallet is crafted from Monogram canvas and accented with pastel leather lining. The thoughtful design features multiple compartments and card slots, along with a fan-style zip coin pocket featuring an LV Circle logo pull. Stylish and practical. 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm (L x H x W)
items.name_cn: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12536 Blue] This Lisa wallet is crafted from Monogram canvas and accented with pastel leather lining. The thoughtful design features multiple compartments and card slots, along with a fan-style zip coin pocket featuring an LV Circle logo pull. Stylish and practical. 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm (L x H x W)

specs.rawTitle: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12536 Blue] This Lisa wallet is crafted from Monogram canvas and accented with pastel leather lining. The thoughtful design features multiple compartments and card slots, along with a fan-style zip coin pocket featuring an LV Circle logo pull. Stylish and practical. 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12657 Yellow] This Multiple wallet releases a modern style with Monogram Heritage canvas, delicately showcasing original Damier pattern details such as crosshatch textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo. 9 x 1.5 x 11.5 cm (H x W x L)
items.name_cn: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12657 Yellow] This Multiple wallet releases a modern style with Monogram Heritage canvas, delicately showcasing original Damier pattern details such as crosshatch textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo. 9 x 1.5 x 11.5 cm (H x W x L)

specs.rawTitle: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12657 Yellow] This Multiple wallet releases a modern style with Monogram Heritage canvas, delicately showcasing original Damier pattern details such as crosshatch textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo. 9 x 1.5 x 11.5 cm (H x W x L)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12746 Blue] This Victorine wallet is made of Monogram canvas, incorporating functional elements with a soft and graceful style. It features card slots and pockets for storing paper money and coins. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Photos N40682/Matched] This Nano Speedy bag inherits the classic Speedy bag silhouette, outlined in soft Damier Denim canvas. Bright new colors reveal a lively interest, with calfskin trim and polished metal accents as eye-catching details. 16x10x7.5cm (Length x Height x Width)
items.name_cn: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Photos N40682/Matched] This Nano Speedy bag inherits the classic Speedy bag silhouette, outlined in soft Damier Denim canvas. Bright new colors reveal a lively interest, with calfskin trim and polished metal accents as eye-catching details. 16x10x7.5cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M11745 White] This zippy wallet is made of soft Mahina calfskin and embellished with an exquisite Monogram perforated pattern. The wallet features a secure full-zip design, with an organized interior featuring multiple pockets, compartments, and a business card slot. Additionally, the wallet can be carried as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width) C

Additionally, the wallet can be carried as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width) C
